title: Rummikub for Seniors
rules_content:
1. Create runs (e.g., Red 1-2-3) or groups (e.g., Red 1, Blue 1, Yellow 1).
2. First play must total 30 points. If no moves, click 'Draw'.
3. The first to clear their hand wins!
encourage_win: Amazing! You are a master player!
encourage_lose: Well played! You're getting better every time!
hint_msg: Try checking for a group of three!
